name: waschplan-app
description: Waschraum-Buchungsapp mit Express, SQLite und statischem Frontend.

scripts.verify: node --check server.js && node --check swiss-time.js && node --check release-window.js && node --check src/routes/diaper-game.js && node --check src/services/backup.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/login.js && node --check public/reset.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check scripts/app-test.js && node --check scripts/security-auth-test.js && node --check scripts/backup-restore-test.js && node --check scripts/full-audit.js && node --check scripts/role-matrix-test.js && node --check scripts/year-simulation-test.js && node --check scripts/accessibility-check.js && node --check scripts/e2e-smoke.js
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run test:security && npm test && npm run test:roles && npm run test:year && npm run test:a11y
